CTRL（The Controller）

How’s that? Got you handled, right?

Dimension Pattern: HHH-HMH-MHH-HHH-MHM
You are one of the rarest personality types out there. You are a natural-born rebel against chaos. For you, “rules” are just default settings and plans are more like rough sketches. A CTRL friend is the person who keeps your life on track: precise, efficient, and impossible to ignore. When things are about to go off the rails, CTRL is the one who hits Ctrl+S, pulls everyone back, and saves the timeline.

Think you might be {{code}}? Take the test and find out!

Start SBTI Test
